description: Composition Red shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full front buttoned placket, yoke at the back, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and has a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron do not iron on decorations Exuding top notch style and comfort, this red shirt from timberland is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail is sure to earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric will keep you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
